sentences.english: Hi, my internet speed has been extremely slow this week.
sentences.korean: 안녕하세요. 이번 주 인터넷 속도가 극도로 느려요.

sentences.english: Can you tell me your account number?
I can see that you're on our basic plan which offers speeds up to fifty megabits per second.
sentences.korean: 기본 요금제에 가입하신 것으로 보이는데 최대 50메가비트 속도를 제공해요.

sentences.english: I'm paying for fifty but I'm only getting about ten.
sentences.korean: 50에 대해 내고 있는데 약 10밖에 안 나와요.

sentences.english: I'll run a diagnostic on your line from our end.
If the issue persists we can send a technician out tomorrow.
sentences.korean: 문제가 지속되면 내일 기술자를 보내드릴 수 있어요.
